install.manifest:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-secrets
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: vaultwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
type: Opaque
stringData:
  ADMIN_TOKEN: <FILL_ME_IN>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-data
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: vaultwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
spec:
  accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: {{storage}}Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: vaultwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: vaultwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 80
    - name: websocket
      port: 3012
      targetPort: 3012
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: vaultwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: vaultwarden
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: vaultwarden
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: app
    spec:
      nodeName: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 65534
        runAsGroup: 65534
        fsGroup: 65534
      containers:
        - name: vaultwarden
          image: vaultwarden/server:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 80
            - name: websocket
              containerPort: 3012
          env:
            - name: DOMAIN
              value: https://{{hostname}}
            - name: SIGNUPS_ALLOWED
              value: "true"
            - name: WEBSOCKET_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: ADMIN_TOKEN
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: ADMIN_TOKEN
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /alive
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /alive
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-data
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: vaultwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  annotations:
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}
spec:
  ingressClassName: traefik
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - {{hostname}}
      secretName: {{instance}}-tls
  rules:
    - host: {{hostname}}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{instance}}
                port:
                  number: 80

secrets.label: Admin panel token
secrets.description: Token that protects the /admin panel (the password to log in at https://<hostname>/admin). Vaultwarden also accepts an Argon2 PHC hash here. Disable SIGNUPS_ALLOWED after creating your first user.

name: Vaultwarden
tagline: Lightweight Bitwarden-compatible password manager.
description: Unofficial Bitwarden server written in Rust. Single binary, SQLite by default, drop-in compatible with the official Bitwarden clients. Ideal first install — small footprint, no external database required.
notes: Set an ADMIN_TOKEN env var to enable the /admin panel. Disable SIGNUPS_ALLOWED after creating your first user.
installPromptTemplate:
You are generating a Kubernetes manifest for the user's k3s cluster.

## App
Vaultwarden ({{instance}}) — Bitwarden-compatible password manager.

## Target
- Namespace: {{namespace}}
- Ingress hostname: {{hostname}}
- Node pin: {{nodeName}} (empty = no nodeSelector)
- Persistent storage: {{storage}}Gi
- Extra notes from user: {{notes}}

## Cluster conventions (MUST follow)
- Single Deployment + Service + Ingress + PersistentVolumeClaim, one YAML document each separated by `---`.
- Image: `vaultwarden/server:latest`, `imagePullPolicy: Always`.
- 1 replica (SQLite — no HA).
- Strategy: `Recreate` (PVC is RWO).
- Pod security: `runAsNonRoot: true`, `runAsUser: 65534`, `runAsGroup: 65534`, `fsGroup: 65534`. Container: `readOnlyRootFilesystem: false` (Vaultwarden writes to /data). Drop all caps.
- Env: `DOMAIN=https://{{hostname}}`, `SIGNUPS_ALLOWED=true` (user will lock down later), `WEBSOCKET_ENABLED=true`.
- PVC: `{{storage}}Gi`, default storageClass (leave unset).
- Container port 80 (HTTP) and 3012 (WebSocket).
- Service: ClusterIP, expose 80 and 3012.
- Ingress: `ingressClassName: traefik`. Annotations: `cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}`. DO NOT set `router.tls: "true"`. TLS section: `hosts: [{{hostname}}]`, `secretName: {{instance}}-tls`.
- Resources: requests cpu 100m / mem 128Mi, limits cpu 500m / mem 512Mi.
- Labels: every resource gets `app.kubernetes.io/name: vaultwarden` and `app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}`.
- Readiness + liveness probe: `httpGet path=/alive port=80`, initialDelaySeconds 10.
- Image pull secret: `imagePullSecrets: [{name: {{imagePullSecret}}}]` (cluster-wide convention even though Docker Hub is public).

## Output
Reply with ONE fenced ```yaml code block containing the full manifest. No prose outside the fence. No comments inside the YAML unless absolutely necessary. The YAML must apply cleanly with `kubectl apply -f -`.

install.manifest:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-secrets
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
type: Opaque
stringData:
  JWT_SECRET: <FILL_ME_IN>
  ANON_KEY: <FILL_ME_IN>
  SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: <FILL_ME_IN>
  POSTGRES_PASSWORD: <FILL_ME_IN>
  DASHBOARD_USERNAME: <FILL_ME_IN>
  DASHBOARD_PASSWORD: <FILL_ME_IN>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-db
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: db
spec:
  accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: {{storage}}Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-storage
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: storage
spec:
  accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-db
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: db
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: db
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-db
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: db
spec:
  serviceName: {{instance}}-db
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: db
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: db
    spec:
      nodeSelector:
        kubernetes.io/hostname: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 999
      containers:
        - name: db
          image: supabase/postgres:15.1.1.78
          args:
            - postgres
            - -c
            - config_file=/etc/postgresql/postgresql.conf
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_HOST
              value: /var/run/postgresql
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: supabase_admin
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: postgres
            - name: POSTGRES_PORT
              value: "5432"
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: JWT_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: JWT_SECRET
            - name: JWT_EXP
              value: "3600"
            - name: PGDATA
              value: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["pg_isready", "-U", "supabase_admin", "-d", "postgres"]
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              cpu: 2000m
              memory: 4Gi
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-db
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-auth
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: auth
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: auth
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 9999
      targetPort: 9999
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-auth
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: auth
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: auth
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: auth
    spec:
      nodeSelector:
        kubernetes.io/hostname: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 65534
      containers:
        - name: auth
          image: supabase/gotrue:v2.158.1
          env:
            - name: GOTRUE_API_HOST
              value: 0.0.0.0
            - name: GOTRUE_API_PORT
              value: "9999"
            - name: API_EXTERNAL_URL
              value: https://{{hostname}}
            - name: GOTRUE_DB_DRIVER
              value: postgres
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: GOTRUE_DB_DATABASE_URL
              value: postgres://supabase_auth_admin:$(POSTGRES_PASSWORD)@{{instance}}-db:5432/postgres
            - name: GOTRUE_SITE_URL
              value: https://{{hostname}}
            - name: GOTRUE_URI_ALLOW_LIST
              value: "*"
            - name: GOTRUE_DISABLE_SIGNUP
              value: "false"
            - name: GOTRUE_JWT_ADMIN_ROLES
              value: service_role
            - name: GOTRUE_JWT_AUD
              value: authenticated
            - name: GOTRUE_JWT_DEFAULT_GROUP_NAME
              value: authenticated
            - name: GOTRUE_JWT_EXP
              value: "3600"
            - name: GOTRUE_JWT_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: JWT_SECRET
            - name: GOTRUE_EXTERNAL_EMAIL_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: GOTRUE_MAILER_AUTOCONFIRM
              value: "true"
            - name: GOTRUE_EXTERNAL_PHONE_ENABLED
              value: "false"
            - name: GOTRUE_SMS_AUTOCONFIRM
              value: "true"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9999
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 9999
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 1Gi
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-rest
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: rest
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: rest
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 3000
      targetPort: 3000
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-rest
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: rest
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: rest
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: rest
    spec:
      nodeSelector:
        kubernetes.io/hostname: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 65534
      containers:
        - name: rest
          image: postgrest/postgrest:v12.2.3
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: PGRST_DB_URI
              value: postgres://authenticator:$(POSTGRES_PASSWORD)@{{instance}}-db:5432/postgres
            - name: PGRST_DB_SCHEMAS
              value: public,storage,graphql_public
            - name: PGRST_DB_ANON_ROLE
              value: anon
            - name: PGRST_JWT_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: JWT_SECRET
            - name: PGRST_DB_USE_LEGACY_GUCS
              value: "false"
            - name: PGRST_APP_SETTINGS_JWT_EXP
              value: "3600"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 3000
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 1Gi
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-realtime
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: realtime
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: realtime
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 4000
      targetPort: 4000
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-realtime
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: realtime
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: realtime
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: realtime
    spec:
      nodeSelector:
        kubernetes.io/hostname: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 65534
      containers:
        - name: realtime
          image: supabase/realtime:v2.30.34
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "4000"
            - name: DB_HOST
              value: {{instance}}-db
            - name: DB_PORT
              value: "5432"
            - name: DB_USER
              value: supabase_admin
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: DB_NAME
              value: postgres
            - name: DB_AFTER_CONNECT_QUERY
              value: SET search_path TO _realtime
            - name: DB_ENC_KEY
              value: supabaserealtime
            - name: API_JWT_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: JWT_SECRET
            - name: SECRET_KEY_BASE
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: JWT_SECRET
            - name: ERL_AFLAGS
              value: "-proto_dist inet_tcp"
            - name: DNS_NODES
              value: "''"
            - name: RLIMIT_NOFILE
              value: "10000"
            - name: APP_NAME
              value: realtime
            - name: SEED_SELF_HOST
              value: "true"
            - name: RUN_JANITOR
              value: "true"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 4000
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 1Gi
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-imgproxy
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: imgproxy
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: imgproxy
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 5001
      targetPort: 5001
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-imgproxy
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: imgproxy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: imgproxy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: imgproxy
    spec:
      nodeSelector:
        kubernetes.io/hostname: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 65534
        fsGroup: 65534
      containers:
        - name: imgproxy
          image: darthsim/imgproxy:v3.8.0
          env:
            - name: IMGPROXY_BIND
              value: ":5001"
            - name: IMGPROXY_LOCAL_FILESYSTEM_ROOT
              value: /var/lib/storage
            - name: IMGPROXY_USE_ETAG
              value: "true"
            - name: IMGPROXY_ENABLE_WEBP_DETECTION
              value: "true"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5001
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 1Gi
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: storage
              mountPath: /var/lib/storage
      volumes:
        - name: storage
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-storage
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-storage
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: storage
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: storage
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 5000
      targetPort: 5000
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-storage
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: storage
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: storage
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: storage
    spec:
      nodeSelector:
        kubernetes.io/hostname: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
      containers:
        - name: storage
          image: supabase/storage-api:v1.11.13
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: ANON_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: ANON_KEY
            - name: SERVICE_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
            - name: ANON_ROLE
              value: anon
            - name: POSTGREST_URL
              value: http://{{instance}}-rest:3000
            - name: PGRST_JWT_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: JWT_SECRET
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              value: postgres://supabase_storage_admin:$(POSTGRES_PASSWORD)@{{instance}}-db:5432/postgres
            - name: FILE_SIZE_LIMIT
              value: "52428800"
            - name: STORAGE_BACKEND
              value: file
            - name: FILE_STORAGE_BACKEND_PATH
              value: /var/lib/storage
            - name: TENANT_ID
              value: stub
            - name: REGION
              value: stub
            - name: GLOBAL_S3_BUCKET
              value: stub
            - name: ENABLE_IMAGE_TRANSFORMATION
              value: "true"
            - name: IMGPROXY_URL
              value: http://{{instance}}-imgproxy:5001
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5000
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /status
              port: 5000
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 1Gi
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}

  annotations:
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}
spec:
  ingressClassName: traefik
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - {{hostname}}
      secretName: {{instance}}-tls
  rules:
    - host: {{hostname}}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{instance}}-kong
                port:
                  number: 8000

secrets.label: JWT secret
secrets.description: Shared HMAC secret all Supabase services use to sign and verify JWTs. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32 (produces 64 hex chars).

secrets.label: Anon API key
secrets.description: A long-lived JWT signed with JWT_SECRET using role=anon. Generate it from JWT_SECRET (see https://supabase.com/docs/guides/self-hosting/docker#api-keys, or jwt.io with payload {"role":"anon","iss":"supabase"}). Used by clients for public/RLS-gated access.

secrets.label: Service role API key
secrets.description: A long-lived JWT signed with JWT_SECRET using role=service_role (bypasses RLS). Generate it like ANON_KEY but with payload role=service_role. Keep this secret.

secrets.label: Postgres password
secrets.description: Superuser password for the bundled Postgres (supabase_admin) shared by every internal service.

secrets.label: Studio dashboard username
secrets.description: Login username for the Studio admin UI exposed at the ingress hostname.

secrets.label: Studio dashboard password
secrets.description: Login password for the Studio admin UI.

name: Supabase
tagline: Open-source Firebase — Postgres, Auth, Storage, Realtime.
description: Bundled backend: Postgres + GoTrue auth + PostgREST + Realtime + Storage + Kong API gateway + Studio admin UI. Large surface area — multiple Deployments and Services. Expect ~2–4 GiB memory usage at idle.
notes: Multi-service install. Studio admin UI is exposed via the ingress; the Postgres + GoTrue + PostgREST services stay ClusterIP only. Generate JWT secret + anon/service keys before applying.
installPromptTemplate:
You are generating a Kubernetes manifest for the user's k3s cluster.

## App
Supabase ({{instance}}) — open-source Firebase alternative. Self-hosted bundle: Postgres + GoTrue auth + PostgREST + Realtime + Storage + Kong API gateway + Studio.

## Target
- Namespace: {{namespace}}
- Public ingress hostname: {{hostname}} (Studio admin UI)
- Node pin: {{nodeName}} (empty = no nodeSelector)
- Postgres PVC size: {{storage}}Gi
- Extra notes from user: {{notes}}

## Cluster conventions (MUST follow)
- Generate placeholders for the secrets the user MUST fill in before applying: `JWT_SECRET` (32+ char random), `ANON_KEY` (JWT signed with JWT_SECRET, role=anon), `SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` (JWT signed with JWT_SECRET, role=service_role), `POSTGRES_PASSWORD`, `DASHBOARD_USERNAME`, `DASHBOARD_PASSWORD`. Surface these as `valueFrom: secretKeyRef` against a single Secret named `{{instance}}-secrets` — and include that Secret as the FIRST document with placeholder values clearly labeled `<FILL_ME_IN>`.
- All Deployments: 1 replica, `Recreate` strategy (PVC is RWO).
- Pod security: `runAsNonRoot: true`, drop all caps. Postgres uses `runAsUser: 999` (postgres uid in supabase/postgres image).
- Postgres: image `supabase/postgres:15.1.0.147`, PVC `{{storage}}Gi` mounted at `/var/lib/postgresql/data` (subPath `pgdata`).
- GoTrue: image `supabase/gotrue:v2.151.0`, env wired to Postgres via service DNS.
- PostgREST: image `postgrest/postgrest:v12.0.1`.
- Realtime: image `supabase/realtime:v2.25.66`.
- Storage: image `supabase/storage-api:v0.43.11`, PVC `5Gi` for file storage.
- Kong: image `kong:2.8.1`, declarative config via ConfigMap routing `/auth → gotrue:9999`, `/rest → postgrest:3000`, `/storage → storage:5000`, `/realtime → realtime:4000`.
- Studio: image `supabase/studio:20240729-ce42139`.
- Services: all ClusterIP. Only one Ingress, pointing to Studio on port 3000.
- Ingress: `ingressClassName: traefik`. Annotations: `cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}`. DO NOT set `router.tls: "true"`. TLS section: `hosts: [{{hostname}}]`, `secretName: {{instance}}-tls`.
- Resources per service: requests 100–300m / 256–512Mi, limits 1 / 1Gi. Postgres gets more: 500m / 1Gi requests, 2 / 4Gi limits.
- Labels: every resource gets `app.kubernetes.io/name: supabase`, `app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}`, `app.kubernetes.io/component: <postgres|gotrue|postgrest|realtime|storage|kong|studio>`.
- Image pull secret: `imagePullSecrets: [{name: {{imagePullSecret}}}]` on every pod spec.
- Readiness probes on each service appropriate to the image (postgres: `pg_isready`; HTTP services: `httpGet /health` or `/`).

## Output
Reply with ONE fenced ```yaml code block containing the full manifest as multiple `---`-separated documents. No prose outside the fence. The first document MUST be the placeholder `{{instance}}-secrets` Secret with `<FILL_ME_IN>` markers and a top comment instructing the user to fill before applying. The YAML must apply cleanly with `kubectl apply -f -` once secrets are filled.

install.manifest:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-secrets
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
type: Opaque
stringData:
  SECRET_KEY_BASE: <FILL_ME_IN>
  TOTP_VAULT_KEY: <FILL_ME_IN>
  POSTGRES_PASSWORD: <FILL_ME_IN>
  CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD: <FILL_ME_IN>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-postgres
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
spec:
  accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 5Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-clickhouse
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: clickhouse
spec:
  accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: {{storage}}Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-config
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
data:
  BASE_URL: https://{{hostname}}
  DISABLE_REGISTRATION: invite_only
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
spec:
  serviceName: postgres
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
    spec:
      nodeName: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
        fsGroup: 999
      containers:
        - name: postgres
          image: postgres:16-alpine
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: plausible
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: plausible
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: PGDATA
              value: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["pg_isready", "-U", "plausible", "-d", "plausible"]
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-postgres
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: clickhouse
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: clickhouse
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: clickhouse
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8123
      targetPort: 8123
    - name: native
      port: 9000
      targetPort: 9000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-clickhouse-config
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: clickhouse
data:
  low-resources.xml: |
    <clickhouse>
      <logger>
        <level>warning</level>
        <console>true</console>
      </logger>
      <query_thread_log remove="remove"/>
      <query_log remove="remove"/>
      <text_log remove="remove"/>
      <trace_log remove="remove"/>
      <metric_log remove="remove"/>
      <asynchronous_metric_log remove="remove"/>
      <session_log remove="remove"/>
      <part_log remove="remove"/>
    </clickhouse>
  user-config.xml: |
    <clickhouse>
      <profiles>
        <default>
          <log_queries>0</log_queries>
          <log_query_threads>0</log_query_threads>
        </default>
      </profiles>
    </clickhouse>
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: clickhouse
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: clickhouse
spec:
  serviceName: clickhouse
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: clickhouse
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: clickhouse
    spec:
      nodeName: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 101
        fsGroup: 101
      containers:
        - name: clickhouse
          image: clickhouse/clickhouse-server:24.3-alpine
          env:
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_DB
              value: plausible_events_db
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_USER
              value: plausible
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8123
            - name: native
              containerPort: 9000
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ping
              port: 8123
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /var/lib/clickhouse
            - name: config
              mountPath: /etc/clickhouse-server/config.d/low-resources.xml
              subPath: low-resources.xml
            - name: config
              mountPath: /etc/clickhouse-server/users.d/user-config.xml
              subPath: user-config.xml
      volumes:
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: {{instance}}-clickhouse-config
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-clickhouse
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service

  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}

  selector:

spec:

    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}

  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible

    spec:
      nodeName: {{nodeName}}
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{imagePullSecret}}
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
      initContainers:
        - name: wait-postgres
          image: postgres:16-alpine
          command: ["sh", "-c", "until pg_isready -h postgres -U plausible; do echo waiting for postgres; sleep 3; done"]
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
        - name: migrate
          image: ghcr.io/plausible/community-edition:v2.1.4
          args: ["db", "migrate"]
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: {{instance}}-config
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD
            - name: SECRET_KEY_BASE
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: SECRET_KEY_BASE
            - name: TOTP_VAULT_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: TOTP_VAULT_KEY
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              value: postgresql://plausible:$(POSTGRES_PASSWORD)@postgres:5432/plausible
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_DATABASE_URL
              value: http://plausible:$(CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD)@clickhouse:8123/plausible_events_db
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
      containers:
        - name: plausible
          image: ghcr.io/plausible/community-edition:v2.1.4
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: {{instance}}-config
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD
            - name: SECRET_KEY_BASE
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: SECRET_KEY_BASE
            - name: TOTP_VAULT_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: TOTP_VAULT_KEY
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              value: postgresql://plausible:$(POSTGRES_PASSWORD)@postgres:5432/plausible
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_DATABASE_URL
              value: http://plausible:$(CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD)@clickhouse:8123/plausible_events_db
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8000
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              cpu: 2000m
              memory: 3Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /api/health
              port: 8000
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  annotations:
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}
spec:
  ingressClassName: traefik
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - {{hostname}}
      secretName: {{instance}}-tls
  rules:
    - host: {{hostname}}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{instance}}
                port:
                  number: 8000

secrets.label: Secret key base
secrets.description: Phoenix signing key for sessions and cookies. Must be a 64-character random string (openssl rand -base64 48).

secrets.label: TOTP vault key
secrets.description: Encryption key for two-factor auth secrets, a 32-byte random value (openssl rand -base64 32).

secrets.label: Postgres password
secrets.description: Password for the bundled Postgres database (settings + users).

secrets.label: ClickHouse password
secrets.description: Password for the bundled ClickHouse database (analytics events).

name: Plausible
tagline: Lightweight, cookie-free web analytics.
description: Privacy-focused Google Analytics alternative. Self-hosted Plausible Analytics dashboard backed by Postgres and ClickHouse. Open source, GDPR-friendly, simple stats UI.
notes: Plausible needs both Postgres (settings + users) AND ClickHouse (events). Bundle the dependencies as StatefulSets with their own PVCs. SECRET_KEY_BASE must be a 64-char base64 string.
installPromptTemplate:
Generate a Kubernetes manifest for **Plausible Analytics** ({{instance}}) on the user's k3s cluster.

## Target
- Namespace: {{namespace}}
- Ingress hostname: {{hostname}}
- Node pin: {{nodeName}}
- Postgres PVC: 5Gi; ClickHouse PVC: {{storage}}Gi
- Notes: {{notes}}

## Cluster conventions
- Three workloads: `plausible` (the Phoenix app), `postgres` (StatefulSet), `clickhouse` (StatefulSet).
- Plausible image: `ghcr.io/plausible/community-edition:v2.1.4`.
- Postgres image: `postgres:16-alpine`, ClickHouse image: `clickhouse/clickhouse-server:24.3-alpine`.
- Secret named `{{instance}}-secrets` with `SECRET_KEY_BASE` (64-char base64 placeholder), `TOTP_VAULT_KEY` (32-byte placeholder), Postgres password, ClickHouse password — all `<FILL_ME_IN>`.
- ConfigMap for env: `BASE_URL=https://{{hostname}}`, `DATABASE_URL=postgresql://...`, `CLICKHOUSE_DATABASE_URL=http://...`, `DISABLE_REGISTRATION=invite_only`.
- One replica per workload, `Recreate` strategy, PVCs default storageClass.
- Pod security: `runAsNonRoot: true`, drop all caps. ClickHouse needs `runAsUser: 101`; Postgres `runAsUser: 999`.
- Services: all ClusterIP. Plausible service on port 8000.
- Ingress: `ingressClassName: traefik`. Annotations: `cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}`. DO NOT set `router.tls: "true"`. TLS section: `hosts: [{{hostname}}]`, `secretName: {{instance}}-tls`.
- Labels: `app.kubernetes.io/name: plausible`, `app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}`, `app.kubernetes.io/component: <app|postgres|clickhouse>`.
- `imagePullSecrets: [{name: {{imagePullSecret}}}]` on every pod spec.
- Readiness probes: Plausible `GET /api/health`, postgres `pg_isready`, clickhouse `GET /ping`.

## Output
One fenced ```yaml block, multi-document, with the placeholder secret first. No prose outside the fence.

install.manifest:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-secrets
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
type: Opaque
stringData:
  NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD: <FILL_ME_IN>
  POSTGRES_PASSWORD: <FILL_ME_IN>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-data
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
spec:
  accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: {{storage}}Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}-postgres
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
spec:
  accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
spec:
  serviceName: postgres
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
        fsGroup: 999
      containers:
        - name: postgres
          image: postgres:16-alpine
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: nextcloud
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: nextcloud
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: PGDATA
              value: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["pg_isready", "-U", "nextcloud", "-d", "nextcloud"]
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-postgres
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: app
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 33
        runAsGroup: 33
        fsGroup: 33
      initContainers:
        - name: wait-postgres
          image: postgres:16-alpine
          command: ["sh", "-c", "until pg_isready -h postgres -U nextcloud; do echo waiting for postgres; sleep 3; done"]
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
      containers:
        - name: nextcloud
          image: nextcloud:29-apache
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_HOST
              value: postgres
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: nextcloud
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: nextcloud
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_USER
              value: admin
            - name: NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD
            - name: NEXTCLOUD_TRUSTED_DOMAINS
              value: {{hostname}}
            - name: OVERWRITEPROTOCOL
              value: https
            - name: OVERWRITECLIURL
              value: https://{{hostname}}
            - name: OVERWRITEHOST
              value: {{hostname}}
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              cpu: 2000m
              memory: 3Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /status.php
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 15
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /var/www/html
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-data
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  annotations:
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}
spec:
  ingressClassName: traefik
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - {{hostname}}
      secretName: {{instance}}-tls
  rules:
    - host: {{hostname}}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{instance}}
                port:
                  number: 80

secrets.label: Admin password
secrets.description: Password for the initial Nextcloud admin account (username `admin`). Set on first boot; change it in the UI afterward if desired.

secrets.label: Postgres password
secrets.description: Password for the bundled Postgres database (user/db `nextcloud`).

name: Nextcloud
tagline: Self-hosted file sync, share, and collaboration.
description: Personal cloud platform: file sync (Dropbox replacement), shared calendars, contacts, notes. Heavy app — PHP-FPM + nginx + Postgres. Plan on at least 2 GiB RAM and a sizeable PVC.
notes: First-time setup wizard creates the admin user via the web UI — keep SIGNUPS open until then, lock it down after. Database is Postgres in the same namespace; bundled SQLite is not recommended for multi-user use.
installPromptTemplate:
Generate a Kubernetes manifest for **Nextcloud** ({{instance}}) on the user's k3s cluster.

## Target
- Namespace: {{namespace}}
- Ingress hostname: {{hostname}}
- Node pin: {{nodeName}}
- Data PVC: {{storage}}Gi; Postgres PVC: 10Gi
- Notes: {{notes}}

## Conventions
- Two workloads: `nextcloud` (Deployment, image `nextcloud:29-apache`) and `postgres` (StatefulSet, image `postgres:16-alpine`).
- Secret `{{instance}}-secrets` with admin password + Postgres password (both `<FILL_ME_IN>`).
- Env on Nextcloud: `POSTGRES_HOST=postgres`, `POSTGRES_DB=nextcloud`, `POSTGRES_USER=nextcloud`, `NEXTCLOUD_TRUSTED_DOMAINS={{hostname}}`, `OVERWRITEPROTOCOL=https`, `OVERWRITECLIURL=https://{{hostname}}`.
- 1 replica, Recreate strategy. Pod security: `runAsNonRoot: true`, `runAsUser: 33` (www-data).
- Service: ClusterIP, port 80.
- Ingress: `ingressClassName: traefik`. Annotations: `cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}`. TLS section: `hosts: [{{hostname}}]`, `secretName: {{instance}}-tls`. Set `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size: 0` equivalent for Traefik via Middleware if needed — note this in a comment but don't add unless the user asks.
- Labels: `app.kubernetes.io/name: nextcloud`, `app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}`.
- `imagePullSecrets: [{name: {{imagePullSecret}}}]`.
- Readiness probe: `httpGet /status.php port=80`, initialDelaySeconds 60 (Nextcloud takes a minute to bootstrap on first run).

One fenced ```yaml block, multi-document, placeholder secret first.

secrets.label: Gitea secret key
secrets.description: Internal signing key for Gitea cookies/sessions (32-byte hex, i.e. openssl rand -hex 32 / gitea generate secret SECRET_KEY). Baked so the install is deterministic and survives pod restarts instead of being auto-generated onto the PVC.

secrets.label: Gitea internal token
secrets.description: Internal API token Gitea uses for hook/internal calls. Baked as a stable random hex value so it is not regenerated on each boot.

name: Gitea
tagline: Lightweight self-hosted Git service + CI runner.
description: GitHub-flavored Git hosting, issue tracking, and Actions-compatible CI runners — in one binary. Small footprint, Postgres or SQLite backing. Best for personal repos and small teams.
notes: Single-replica only — SQLite by default. For multi-replica HA you'd swap to Postgres + a shared PVC; not covered in v1.
installPromptTemplate:
Generate a Kubernetes manifest for **Gitea** ({{instance}}) on the user's k3s cluster.

## Target
- Namespace: {{namespace}}
- Ingress hostname: {{hostname}}
- Node pin: {{nodeName}}
- Repo PVC: {{storage}}Gi
- Notes: {{notes}}

## Conventions
- Single Deployment, image `gitea/gitea:1.22`, 1 replica, Recreate strategy.
- SQLite backing (no separate database pod).
- Pod security: `runAsNonRoot: true`, `runAsUser: 1000`, `runAsGroup: 1000`, `fsGroup: 1000`.
- Env: `GITEA__server__DOMAIN={{hostname}}`, `GITEA__server__ROOT_URL=https://{{hostname}}/`, `GITEA__server__SSH_DOMAIN={{hostname}}`, `GITEA__service__DISABLE_REGISTRATION=false` (until first user), `GITEA__database__DB_TYPE=sqlite3`.
- Ports: 3000 (HTTP), 22 (SSH).
- PVC `{{storage}}Gi` mounted at `/data`.
- Service: ClusterIP exposing both 3000 and 22 (SSH won't be reachable from outside the cluster without a NodePort or LoadBalancer; mention in a comment but don't add).
- Ingress: only 3000. `ingressClassName: traefik`. Annotations: `cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}`. TLS: `secretName: {{instance}}-tls`.
- Labels: `app.kubernetes.io/name: gitea`, `app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}`.
- `imagePullSecrets: [{name: {{imagePullSecret}}}]`.
- Readiness probe: `httpGet /api/healthz port=3000`, initialDelaySeconds 20.

## Output
One fenced ```yaml block, multi-document. No prose outside the fence.

metadata:
  name: postgres
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
spec:
  serviceName: postgres
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: linkwarden
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: linkwarden
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: postgres
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
        fsGroup: 999
      containers:
        - name: postgres
          image: postgres:16-alpine
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: linkwarden
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: linkwarden
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: PGDATA
              value: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["pg_isready", "-U", "linkwarden", "-d", "linkwarden"]
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]

    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 3000
      targetPort: 3000
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: linkwarden
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: linkwarden
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: app
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
      initContainers:
        - name: wait-postgres
          image: postgres:16-alpine
          command: ["sh", "-c", "until pg_isready -h postgres -U linkwarden; do echo waiting for postgres; sleep 3; done"]
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
      containers:
        - name: linkwarden
          image: ghcr.io/linkwarden/linkwarden:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 3000
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              value: postgresql://linkwarden:$(POSTGRES_PASSWORD)@postgres:5432/linkwarden
            - name: NEXTAUTH_URL
              value: https://{{hostname}}/api/v1/auth
            - name: NEXTAUTH_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: NEXTAUTH_SECRET
            - name: NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_REGISTRATION
              value: "false"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1500m
              memory: 2Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /api/v1/ping
              port: 3000
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/data
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-data
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkwarden
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: app
  annotations:
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}
spec:
  ingressClassName: traefik
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - {{hostname}}
      secretName: {{instance}}-tls
  rules:
    - host: {{hostname}}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{instance}}
                port:
                  number: 3000

secrets.label: NextAuth secret
secrets.description: Signing key for NextAuth sessions/cookies. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

secrets.label: Postgres password
secrets.description: Password for the bundled Postgres database user.

name: Linkwarden
tagline: Bookmark + page-archive manager.
description: Self-hosted Pocket / Pinboard / raindrop.io alternative. Save links, take notes, capture full-page archives (PDF + screenshot). Postgres-backed.
notes: Page archiving uses headless Chromium — that's where the memory headroom goes. Postgres lives in the same namespace.
installPromptTemplate:
Generate a Kubernetes manifest for **Linkwarden** ({{instance}}) on the user's k3s cluster.

## Target
- Namespace: {{namespace}}
- Ingress hostname: {{hostname}}
- Node pin: {{nodeName}}
- Archives PVC: {{storage}}Gi; Postgres PVC: 5Gi
- Notes: {{notes}}

## Conventions
- Two workloads: `linkwarden` (Deployment, image `ghcr.io/linkwarden/linkwarden:latest`) + `postgres` (StatefulSet, image `postgres:16-alpine`).
- Secret `{{instance}}-secrets` with `NEXTAUTH_SECRET` (32-byte base64 placeholder) and Postgres password — `<FILL_ME_IN>`.
- Env on Linkwarden: `DATABASE_URL=postgresql://linkwarden@postgres:5432/linkwarden`, `NEXTAUTH_URL=https://{{hostname}}`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_REGISTRATION=false` (lock down after first user).
- 1 replica per workload, Recreate strategy. Pod security: `runAsNonRoot: true`.
- Service: ClusterIP, port 3000.
- Ingress: `ingressClassName: traefik`. Annotations: `cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure`, `traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}`. TLS `secretName: {{instance}}-tls`.
- Labels: `app.kubernetes.io/name: linkwarden`, `app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}`, `app.kubernetes.io/component: <app|postgres>`.
- `imagePullSecrets: [{name: {{imagePullSecret}}}]`.
- Readiness: Linkwarden `httpGet /api/v1/ping port=3000`; Postgres `pg_isready`.

One fenced ```yaml block, multi-document, placeholder secret first.

    app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
  ports:
    - name: redis
      port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: redis
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
spec:
  serviceName: redis
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
      containers:
        - name: redis
          image: redis:7-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["redis-cli", "PING"]
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-redis
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 6060
      targetPort: 6060
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1001
        fsGroup: 1001
      initContainers:
        - name: wait-postgres
          image: postgres:15-alpine
          command: ["sh", "-c", "until pg_isready -h postgres -U penpot; do echo waiting for postgres; sleep 3; done"]
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
      containers:
        - name: backend
          image: penpotapp/backend:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6060
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: PENPOT_SECRET_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{instance}}-secrets
                  key: PENPOT_SECRET_KEY
            - name: PENPOT_FLAGS
              value: enable-registration enable-login-with-password disable-email-verification
            - name: PENPOT_PUBLIC_URI
              value: https://{{hostname}}
            - name: PENPOT_DATABASE_URI
              value: postgresql://postgres:5432/penpot
            - name: PENPOT_DATABASE_USERNAME
              value: penpot
            - name: PENPOT_DATABASE_PASSWORD
              value: $(POSTGRES_PASSWORD)
            - name: PENPOT_REDIS_URI
              value: redis://redis:6379/0
            - name: PENPOT_ASSETS_STORAGE_BACKEND
              value: assets-fs
            - name: PENPOT_STORAGE_ASSETS_FS_DIRECTORY
              value: /opt/data/assets
            - name: PENPOT_TELEMETRY_ENABLED
              value: "false"
            - name: PENPOT_HTTP_SERVER_MAX_BODY_SIZE
              value: "31457280"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 2000m
              memory: 2Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: 6060
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: assets
              mountPath: /opt/data
      volumes:
        - name: assets
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{instance}}-assets
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exporter
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: exporter
spec:
  selector:

    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: exporter
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 6061

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:

  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: exporter
spec:

            - name: PENPOT_REDIS_URI

          resources:

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1001
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: penpotapp/frontend:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          env:
            - name: PENPOT_FLAGS
              value: enable-registration enable-login-with-password
            - name: PENPOT_BACKEND_URI
              value: http://backend:6060
            - name: PENPOT_EXPORTER_URI
              value: http://exporter:6061
            - name: PENPOT_INTERNAL_RESOLVER
              value: kube-dns.kube-system.svc.cluster.local
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop: [ALL]
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{instance}}
  namespace: {{namespace}}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: penpot
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{instance}}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
  annotations:
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{clusterIssuer}}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{redirectMiddleware}}
spec:
  ingressClassName: traefik
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - {{hostname}}
      secretName: {{instance}}-tls
  rules:
    - host: {{hostname}}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: frontend
                port:
                  number: 80
